summary: Frontend testing of Session 3 features: Dark mode (ThemeContext), DatePicker (3 selects), and Portal habit localStorage persistence. All major features pass.

integration_issues.flow: DatePicker month select via Playwright select_option
integration_issues.issue: Playwright's select_option does not update React controlled value for month select (value reads '' after selection). However form submits successfully, so this appears to be a Playwright/React synthetic event issue rather than a real user-facing bug. The form validation error 'La fecha de nacimiento es requerida' only appears when truly no date is selected.
integration_issues.severity: minor - testing concern only, not user-facing

critical_code_review_comments: DatePicker month select may need nativeEvent dispatch compatibility - works functionally but React's synthetic event system may not detect value changes from programmatic select_option in some test environments. Consider adding a test helper or data attribute for testing month value.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 3 features tested and passing. Key flows: 1) Dark mode toggle (data-testid='theme-toggle') toggles Moon/Sun icon, persists 'saude_theme' in localStorage, applies data-theme='dark' to html element. 2) DatePicker at step 3 (/questionnaire) shows 3 selects with testids lastPeriod-day/month/year; btn-next disabled until all 3 selected. 3) Register DatePicker (birthDate-day/month/year) - form submits to /results. 4) Portal habit checkboxes (data-testid='habit-{pillarId}-{index}') persist in localStorage as 'saude_habit_{pillarId}_{index}=true' and survive page reload. 5) Full flow: questionnaire(7 steps) → /register → /results → /portal works. Note: Playwright select_option for month reads '' but actual functionality works - use JS nativeInputValueSetter approach or select_option is fine for day/year.

test_results.dark_mode_toggle_visible: PASS - theme-toggle button found in navbar top-right
test_results.dark_mode_persists_localStorage: PASS - saude_theme=dark after toggle, data-theme=dark after reload
test_results.datepicker_step3_three_selects: PASS - lastPeriod-day, lastPeriod-month, lastPeriod-year all found
test_results.datepicker_step3_enables_next_btn: PASS - btn-next disabled before date, enabled after selecting day+month+year
test_results.portal_habit_svg_checkbox: PASS - habit checked state shows strikethrough text (SVG animated checkbox)
